# UC-15.5.12 · CCTV ONVIF Event Subscription Health and Reconnect Failures

## Description

Stale ONVIF subscriptions silently stop analytics and alarm forwarding to VMS.

## Value

Keeps multi-vendor estates integrated reliably.

## Implementation

(1) Log client pull-point renewals. (2) Alert on auth failures. (3) Automate token rotation.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="onvif:events" earliest=-24h
| where match(lower(_raw), "(?i)renew|subscribe|disconnect|fault|http 401")
| stats count by pullpoint_endpoint camera_id
```

## Visualization

Error rate line; table endpoints.

## References

- [ONVIF specifications](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
